data.body:
[LIVIN' ON SWEETS! - Mini Game Notice]

Sensei, we've prepared a mini game in celebration of the "-ive aLIVE!" event!
Participate in the event to get 1,000 Pyroxenes and various other rewards!

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2668679
⏩Play mini game: https://bluearchive.nexon.com/events/2024/10/minigame?fix_ip=1.1.1.1

#BlueArchive
